data.body:
PASS 1 review — rubric T3 (Integration feasibility, overlay):

NOT-APPLICABLE / PASS. The T3 overlay applies only when a plan integrates an external API/CLI/service/library or asserts a capability it has not used before. This is a documentation-only ticket — Scope: "Docs only; the canonical workflow-engine intended-use doc lives in 6f2d." The What/AC sections only describe authoring docs (gate behavior, config surface, fail-open, cert semantics, the CI-check pattern, and the Pass-4 affirmative coach) and cross-referencing existing internal artifacts (6f2d WS-DOC, 75a9). No external CLI/API/service/library is being integrated and no never-before-used capability is asserted; the cross-references are to internal rebar tickets (already-used / internal), which the overlay calls not-applicable. There are no named external subcommands/endpoints to verify, and no auth/HTTPS preconditions to state because no service is contacted.

Affirmations (T3): not-applicable for this docs-only chunk — no findings.
